case_title: AUNE CHAU ET AL VS. DOUGLAS HARR ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR APR-28-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-28-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-18-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2015 CONTINUED TO JUL-28-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-28-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT BY NOEL D. HIBBARD, ESQ.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAU, AUNE KAM, JOHNSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARR, DOUGLAS DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-04-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-12-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-04-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-18-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST NOEL D. HIBBARD, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-28-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-15-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
